PowerShell($n = \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($n\) { $n.Source } else { "node not found" })
PowerShell($py = Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($py\) { $py.Source; & python --version } else { "python not found" })

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { "LISTENING on 5000 \(PID $\($conn.OwningProcess | Select-Object -First 1\)\)" } else { "not yet listening" })

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { Stop-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess -Force; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800; Write-Output "stopped old PID $\($conn.OwningProcess\)" } else { Write-Output "nothing was listening" }; Start-Process -FilePath "C:\\Users\\arowberry\\AppData\\Local\\Microsoft\\WindowsApps\\python.exe" -ArgumentList "app.py" -WorkingDirectory "C:\\Claude Code Projects\\AlForks" -WindowStyle Hidden; Write-Output "relaunched")

PowerShell($ok=$false; for \($i=0; $i -lt 20; $i++\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/compare" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; $inline = \($r.Content -split "`n" | Select-String "mapboxgl-ctrl-group"\).Count; Write-Output "UP: /compare HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\); inline mapbox rules present: $inline"; $ok=$true; break } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 700 } }; if \(-not $ok\) { Write-Output "NOT RESPONDING" })
